title: Service of Process
description: After filing, you must properly serve the court papers on your spouse according to New York court rules.
tips: Use the Affidavit of Service (or Affirmation of Service) to document how and when papers were delivered.
Service must follow the method allowed for matrimonial actions in Supreme Court.
Keep proof of service — you will need it for later steps.
warnings: Incorrect service can delay your case or require you to serve again.
